queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of negative checking account balances on credit default probability and risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account as a driver of increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: no credits taken or all previous credits paid back duly.
queries.question: Empirical evidence regarding the contribution of a credit history characterized by no prior credits or fully paid obligations to credit default probability.
